Container.Name: azan-clock
Container.Overview: Full-screen Azan Clock dashboard showing Dubai prayer times (IACAD method), iqama times, weather, Hijri date, and Azan audio playback. Configure via built-in settings page at http://[IP]:[PORT:3000]/settings - upload audio files, set location, iqama offsets, and more.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web dashboard. Settings page at /settings

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: System timezone (IANA format). Can also be set via Settings page.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Configuration directory. Settings page saves config here.

Config.Name: Audio Files
Config.Description: Azan audio files directory. Upload via Settings page or place MP3 files here manually.

Config.Name: Latitude
Config.Description: Override location latitude (leave empty to use Settings page value)

Config.Name: Longitude
Config.Description: Override location longitude (leave empty to use Settings page value)

Config.Name: City
Config.Description: Override city name (leave empty to use Settings page value)

Config.Name: Calculation Method
Config.Description: Override calculation method (leave empty to use Settings page value)

Config.Name: Madhab
Config.Description: Override madhab - Shafi or Hanafi (leave empty to use Settings page value)
